title: Oxygen/Euphoria
description: Maximum FPS, beautiful shaders, and crisp sounds. Completely client-sided and extremely lightweight.
body:
# Oxygen

## Overview
Experience Minecraft like never before with our ultra-lightweight, FPS-boosting modpack. It's designed to enhance your gameplay without compromising the classic vanilla feel. Enjoy breathtaking shaders, crystal-clear sound enhancements, and seamless compatibility, all while maintaining high frame rates.

## Features

### 🌟 Beautiful Shaders
- **Stunning Visuals:** Immerse yourself in a world of vivid colors and dynamic lighting.
- **Optimized Performance:** Enjoy these visual upgrades without the usual FPS drop.

### 🔊 Crisp Sounds
- **Enhanced Audio:** Experience Minecraft's environment with clearer, more realistic sound effects and footsteps

### 💻 Fully Client-Side & Vanilla Compatible
- **No Server Modifications Needed:** Play on any vanilla server without issues.
- **Client-Side Installation:** Easy setup that doesn't change the game for others.

### ⚡ Extremely Lightweight
- **Optimized Setup:** Crafted to ensure minimal resource usage.
- **High FPS:** Designed with performance as a priority, ideal for all types of PCs.

### 🥇 Pick your style
- **Oxygen:** Classic oxygen.
- **Euphoria:** made for a slightly older version of Minecraft (1.20.1). Includes first person model and camera overhaul for better immersion.

## Installation Guide
1. Install the Modrinth App if you haven't already
2. Download the modpack from within the Modrinth app modpack browser or import the mrpack file

## System Requirements
- Operating System: Windows, macOS, Linux
- RAM: Minimum 4GB (8GB recommended)
- GPU: DirectX 11 or OpenGL 4.1 compatible

## Other Projects
- Check out my other projects at [Sfinford Development](https://sfinford.github.io)
